case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION VS KEN NELSON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KEN NELSON
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-20-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JUN-22-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEN NELSON $1,882.85 PRINCIPAL, $86.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,968.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE DEFT IN THIS CASE WAS NOT SERVED. THE CLAIM OF PLTF WAS NEVER RECEIVED IN THE RETURN MAIL. I BE- LIEVE THESE PAPERS HAVE BECOME LOST IN THE MAIL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,882.85 FILED BY PATELCO CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT KEN NELSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
